mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.item_type AS itemType, t.title, t.amount, t.payer, stu.name AS studentName, t.operator, sta.name AS handlerName, t.remark, t.add_time AS submitTime, t.verify_state AS verifyState, t.verify_remark AS verifyRemark FROM finance_record t LEFT JOIN student stu ON t.payer = stu.id
AND stu.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.payerName}, '%')
LEFT JOIN staff sta ON t.operator = sta.id
AND sta.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.handlerName}, '%')
AND t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.title}, '%')
AND t.verify_state = #{condition.verifyState}
AND t.item_type = #{condition.itemType}
ORDER BY t.id DESC

SELECT t.id, t.item_type AS type, t.title, t.amount, stu.name AS studentName, t.operator, t.remark, t.verify_state AS verifyState, t.verify_remark AS verifyRemark, t.add_time AS submitTime FROM finance_record t LEFT JOIN student stu ON stu.id = t.payer ORDER BY t.id DESC
